locationName: Looted from Thops' body. You must give him the Academy Glintstone Key first.

the Dragon Communion Altar at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion in Caelid for 2 Dragon Hearts. Players need to defeat Flying Dragon Agheel in order to unlock this Incantation.
The entire Alberich's Set can be found in the main hall of the Fortified manor in Leyndell, Royal Capital, near the Fortified Manor, first floor Site of Grace.
Dropped by Albinauric Wolfback Archers around the Consecrated Snowfield. At least four Albinauric Archers can be found south-southwest of the Ordina, Liturgical Town sight of grace.

The entire All-Knowing Set is dropped by Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-Knowing upon defeat. Sir Gideon is encountered as a boss in Leyndell, Ashen Capital, an alternate version of the Royal Capital accessible only after making significant progress in the story.

Dropped by the Death Rite Bird in Liurnia of the Lakes, to the east of Raya Lucaria Academy at night, south of the Gate Town North site of grace.

Located in a chest on the top of the tower directly above the Impassable Greatbridge site of grace, in front of Redmane Castle, in Caelid.

After defeating Godrick the Grafted in Stormveil Castle, Rogier can be found in Roundtable Hold, by the balcony. After speaking to him, and receiving his rapier, the skill may be removed from the rapier in order to be applied to other armaments.
Limgrave: dropped by a mounted Godrick Knight on the cliff southwest above the Deathtouched Catacombs when defeated. He's at the east side hill of the Limgrave colosseum.
Sold by Knight Bernahl at the Warmaster's Shack for 1,000. Elden Ring.
